sinus_annulus_relation.summary: Sinus diameters remain larger than annulus equivalent diameter and are clinically coherent.
sinus_annulus_relation.expected_context: Sinus diameter should generally exceed annulus diameter in tricuspid native root anatomy.

stj_sinus_relation.summary: STJ diameter remains below sinus diameter with coherent root tapering.
stj_sinus_relation.expected_context: STJ typically remains smaller than sinus diameter unless there is aneurysmal remodeling.

commissure_symmetry.summary: Commissural spacing remains balanced with tricuspid geometry around 120-degree spacing.
commissure_symmetry.expected_context: Clinical interpretation favors balanced tricuspid spacing over strict mechanical equality.

coronary_height_assessment.summary: Coronary ostia were not measured reliably in this CT pipeline run and require clinician review.
coronary_height_assessment.expected_context: Coronary height is only accepted when both ostia are confidently localized on the current CTA acquisition.

notes: Clinical gate semantics use Normal / Borderline / Review Required / Not Assessable / Failed instead of rigid mechanical booleans.
Sinus vs annulus, STJ vs sinus, commissure balance, and coronary height remain clinical reasonableness checks rather than automatic hard stops.
